summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Romanian Members & Guests Management App. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality fully operational with excellent user experience. All core features tested including authentication, CRUD operations, attendance management, and responsive design.

minor_issues.issue: Lines 272-282 have redundant code - queries db.members first then db.guests for guest updates
minor_issues.impact: Code duplication but functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend API - User registration and login (JWT authentication)
Backend API - Members CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend API - Guests CRUD operations with date filtering
Backend API - Attendance management and tracking
Backend API - Daily attendance reports with totals
Frontend - User registration and login flow
Frontend - Members table with attendance checkboxes
Frontend - Editable taxa fields with real-time total calculation
Frontend - Guests table with inline editing
Frontend - Date picker for selecting different dates
Frontend - Members management page with CRUD operations
Integration - Real-time data updates and synchronization
